propagators.name: Propagators
propagators.description: Configure context propagation formats for distributed tracing

options.name: W3C TraceContext
options.description: W3C Trace Context propagator. Required for interoperability with W3C-compatible systems.

options.name: W3C Baggage
options.description: W3C Baggage propagator for passing key-value pairs across service boundaries.

options.name: B3 (single header)
options.description: Zipkin B3 single-header propagator for compatibility with Zipkin and older systems.

options.name: OTLP HTTP
options.description: Export spans via OTLP over HTTP. Recommended for most setups.

options.name: OTLP gRPC
options.description: Export spans via OTLP over gRPC.

options.name: Console
options.description: Print spans to stdout. Useful for debugging.

sampler.name: Sampler
sampler.description: How to make sampling decisions for new traces

options.name: Parent Based
options.description: Use the parent span's sampling decision. Root spans use the configured root sampler.

options.name: Always Off
options.description: Sample 0% of traces. Useful for disabling tracing.

options.name: Trace ID Ratio
options.description: Sample a fixed percentage of traces based on trace ID.

batch_processor.name: Batch Processor
batch_processor.description: Configure the batch span processor that buffers and exports spans

settings.name: export_timeout
settings.label: Export Timeout (ms)
settings.description: Maximum time allowed to export data. 0 = no limit.

settings.name: max_queue_size
settings.label: Max Queue Size
settings.description: Maximum spans to queue before dropping
